    H

    handle(Request) - Method in class com.server.network.RequestHandler
    Processes an incoming request without client info (for backward compatibility).
    handle(Request, String) - Method in class com.server.network.RequestHandler
    Processes an incoming request and generates a response.
    HandleCommand(String, MinHeap) - Static method in class com.utils.CommandManager
    Parses and executes a command based on the input string.
    hashCode() - Method in class com.model.MusicBand
    Returns a hash code value for this music band.
    health(ServerStats) - Static method in class com.common.Response
    Factory method to create a health check response.
    HEALTH - Enum constant in enum class com.common.Request.RequestType
    Check server health and get server statistics
    HealthChecker - Class in com.client.network
    Utility class for checking server health.
    HealthChecker(String, int) - Constructor for class com.client.network.HealthChecker
    Creates a new health checker for the specified server.
    HelpCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for displaying help information.
    HelpCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.HelpCommand
